zh.lifeSummary: 當William Wasteneys於1244年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可爾頓時，他的父親William Wasteneys29歲，母親Margaret21歲。他於大約1270年與Constance在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可爾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1290年之後在英國斯塔福爾可爾頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾可爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Wasteneys于1244年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾可爾頓时，他的父亲William Wasteneys29岁，母亲Margaret21岁。他于大约1270年与Constance在英国英格兰斯塔福爾可爾頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1290年之后在英国斯塔福爾可爾頓，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾可爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Wasteneys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from the Norman French pronunciation of le Gâtinais (formerly Gastinois), a province occupying parts of the modern Seine-et-Marne and Loiret.

variants.name: Westney
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Westan-ig, from westan, west, and ig, an island, meaning a Western island

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When William Wasteneys was born in 1244, in Colton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Wasteneys, was 29 and his mother, Margaret, was 21. He married Constance about 1270, in Colton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died after 1290, in Colton, Staffordshire, England, and was buried in Colton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Wasteneys est né en 1244, à Colton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Wasteneys, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Constance environ 1270, à Colton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé après 1290, à Colton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Colton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Wasteneys 1244 in Colton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Wasteneys 29 und seine Mutter Margaret 21. Er hat um 1270 in Colton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Constance geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb nach 1290 in Colton, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Colton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Wasteneys è nato il nel 1244 nel Colton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Wasteneys, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Constance circa 1270, nel Colton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì dopo il 1290, nel Colton, Staffordshire, England, e fu sepolto a Colton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Wasteneysが1244年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアコルトンで生まれた時，父William Wasteneysは29歳，母Margaretは21歳であった。約1270年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアコルトンでConstanceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1290年以後にイギリススタフォードシュアイアコルトンで死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアコルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Wasteneys(이)가 1244년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 콜턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Wasteneys(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 콜턴에서 Constance(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1290년 이후 영국 스태퍼드실르 콜턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 콜턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Wasteneys nasceu em 1244, em Colton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Wasteneys, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Constance aproximadamente 1270, em Colton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1290, em Colton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Colton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Wasteneys родился в 1244 г. в местности колтон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Wasteneys было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance около 1270 г. в местности колтон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер после 1290 г. в местности колтон, стаффордшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности колтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Wasteneys nació en 1244, en Colton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Wasteneys, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Constance aproximadamente 1270, en Colton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió después de 1290, en Colton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Colton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
